XQTL2.Xplore 0.0.0.9000
  • Reference
    • Using XQTL2.Xplore
    • XQTL2: A Complete Workflow for XQTL Analysis

Package index

All functions

DELETE_read_vcfs()
Read and process multiple VCF files (SLOW - for data creation use create_variants_object.R instead)
XQTL_5panel_plot()
Create a 5-panel XQTL plot with shared X-axis and combined legend using patchwork only
XQTL_Manhattan()
XQTL Manhattan Plot
XQTL_Manhattan_5panel()
XQTL Manhattan 5-panel Plot
XQTL_SVBySize()
Plot structural variants by size
XQTL_change_average()
Plot average frequency changes or selection coefficients by position
XQTL_change_byRep()
Plot frequency changes by replicate
XQTL_genes()
Plot genes in a genomic region
XQTL_region()
Plot a genomic region
XQTL_variantsByFounder()
Plot variants by founder
XQTL_zoom()
Find and visualize peaks in a genomic region
determine_sv_subtype()
Determine SV subtype from INFO field
dm6.ncbiRefSeq.genes
Processed gene annotations for Drosophila melanogaster (dm6)
dm6.variants
Processed variant data for Drosophila melanogaster (dm6)
get_palette()
Get color palette for founders
zinc_hanson_means
Example founder means from ZINC Hanson experiment
zinc_hanson_pseudoscan
Example QTL scan results from ZINC Hanson experiment

Developed by Anthony Long.
